variants.task: Create /tmp/eval_ct/ct.py — Reads from stdin: line 1 is T. Each case is two consecutive lines (a and b — strings, may be empty). For each case, output 'true' if a == b else 'false', on its own line. Implement a constant-time comparison that does NOT short-circuit on the first differing byte: accumulate `diff |= a[i] ^ b[i]` (an XOR accumulator OR-ed across every byte) over equal-length inputs, and on a length mismatch set the accumulator to a nonzero 'differ' value while still walking one operand's bytes so timing stays bounded; the result is equal iff the accumulator is zero. Do NOT call any stdlib constant-time / timing-safe equality helper, and do NOT use memcmp/strcmp/strncmp or an early-return byte comparison. Pure Python; no numpy.

validation.script: set -e; cd /tmp/eval_ct; python3 -c 'import re,sys; f,lang=sys.argv[1],sys.argv[2]; pats=sys.argv[3:]; src=open(f).read(); src=re.sub(r"/\*.*?\*/"," ",src,flags=re.S); L=[re.sub(r"\"(?:\\.|[^\"\\])*\""," ",(re.sub(r"#.*$","",ln) if lang.startswith("py") else re.sub(r"//.*$","",ln))) for ln in src.split(chr(10))]; s=chr(10).join(L); sys.exit(1 if any(re.search(p,s) for p in pats) else 0)' ct.py python 'hmac\.compare_digest' 'secrets\.compare_digest' || { echo "forbidden api"; exit 1; }; python3 -c 'import re,sys; f,lang=sys.argv[1],sys.argv[2]; pat=sys.argv[3]; src=open(f).read(); src=re.sub(r"/\*.*?\*/"," ",src,flags=re.S); L=[re.sub(r"\"(?:\\.|[^\"\\])*\""," ",(re.sub(r"#.*$","",ln) if lang.startswith("py") else re.sub(r"//.*$","",ln))) for ln in src.split(chr(10))]; s=chr(10).join(L); sys.exit(0 if re.search(pat,s) else 1)' ct.py python '\^' || { echo "missing XOR accumulator (^)"; exit 1; }; python3 ct.py < input.txt > out.txt && diff -u expected.txt out.txt && echo OK

variants.task: Create /tmp/eval_ct/ct.zig — Reads from stdin: line 1 is T. Each case is two consecutive lines (a and b — strings, may be empty). For each case, output 'true' if a == b else 'false', on its own line. Implement a constant-time comparison that does NOT short-circuit on the first differing byte: accumulate `diff |= a[i] ^ b[i]` (an XOR accumulator OR-ed across every byte) over equal-length inputs, and on a length mismatch set the accumulator to a nonzero 'differ' value while still walking one operand's bytes so timing stays bounded; the result is equal iff the accumulator is zero. Do NOT call any stdlib constant-time / timing-safe equality helper, and do NOT use memcmp/strcmp/strncmp or an early-return byte comparison. Use Zig 0.16+ idioms. Entrypoint: `pub fn main(init: std.process.Init) !void`. For stdio, the rich API (`takeDelimiter`, `appendRemainingUnlimited`, `print`, `writeAll`, `flush`) lives on the `std.Io.Reader`/`Writer` *interface*, NOT on the concrete `std.Io.File.Reader`/`Writer`. Reach the interface via `&fr.interface`. Canonical setup: `var in_buf: [4096]u8 = undefined; var fr = std.Io.File.stdin().reader(init.io, &in_buf); const r = &fr.interface;` and the symmetric writer. Then `try r.takeDelimiter('\n')` (returns `?[]u8`, null at EOF) for line-by-line, or `try r.appendRemainingUnlimited(init.arena.allocator(), &list)` to slurp. Always `try w.flush()` before return — output is buffered. Strict-default footguns (errors, not warnings, in 0.16): rename unused params to `_`, discard unused locals with `_ = x;`, prefer `const` over `var` when not mutated. Use `std.Io` (capital I), not `std.io`. Compile with `zig build-exe -O ReleaseFast ct.zig`.

validation.script: set -e; cd /tmp/eval_ct; python3 -c 'import re,sys; f,lang=sys.argv[1],sys.argv[2]; pats=sys.argv[3:]; src=open(f).read(); src=re.sub(r"/\*.*?\*/"," ",src,flags=re.S); L=[re.sub(r"\"(?:\\.|[^\"\\])*\""," ",(re.sub(r"#.*$","",ln) if lang.startswith("py") else re.sub(r"//.*$","",ln))) for ln in src.split(chr(10))]; s=chr(10).join(L); sys.exit(1 if any(re.search(p,s) for p in pats) else 0)' ct.zig zig 'std\.crypto\.timing_safe' 'std\.crypto\.utils\.timingSafeEql' || { echo "forbidden api"; exit 1; }; python3 -c 'import re,sys; f,lang=sys.argv[1],sys.argv[2]; pat=sys.argv[3]; src=open(f).read(); src=re.sub(r"/\*.*?\*/"," ",src,flags=re.S); L=[re.sub(r"\"(?:\\.|[^\"\\])*\""," ",(re.sub(r"#.*$","",ln) if lang.startswith("py") else re.sub(r"//.*$","",ln))) for ln in src.split(chr(10))]; s=chr(10).join(L); sys.exit(0 if re.search(pat,s) else 1)' ct.zig zig '\^' || { echo "missing XOR accumulator (^)"; exit 1; }; zig build-exe -O ReleaseFast ct.zig && ./ct < input.txt > out.txt && diff -u expected.txt out.txt && echo OK
